description: Pack of three pairsWear these comfy socks from puma to keep your feet cosy and sweat free. puma ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Above ankle length socks - one pair each in blue, black and greyMade of 78% cotton and 22% nylonBig chunky rib at opening to grip above ankle with contrast tipsEmbroidered branding on the cuffThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitTerry-towelling inner for extreme comfort and warmthCareMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
